tasks.subject: Task 1: server/constants.js — de-duplicate the player cap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace duplicated literal 8 (max players/lobby) with MAX_PLAYERS_PER_LOBBY in a new server/constants.js; existing server Jest suite proves losslessness.

**Files:** Create server/constants.js; modify server/systems/lobbySystem.js (require + lines 98-101, 118, 570) and server/gameLogic.js (require + lines 344-345). Do NOT touch the unrelated 8s: socketHandlers.js:32/48/51/357, matchSystem.js:25/325.

**Verify:** `npm test -- --selectProjects server` PASS; `npm test -- --coverage --runInBand` floor held; grep -nE "players\.length (>=|<) 8|\(8 player" on the two files → no matches.

```json:metadata
{"files":["server/constants.js","server/systems/lobbySystem.js","server/gameLogic.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- --selectProjects server","acceptanceCriteria":["constants.js exports MAX_PLAYERS_PER_LOBBY=8","4 real cap sites use the constant; full-lobby error byte-identical","unrelated 8s untouched","server suite green + coverage floor held"],"reviewModel":"cheap"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: split public/js/ui.js into a barrel + 6 domain modules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move ui.js sections verbatim into public/js/ui/{ui-dom,ui-render,ui-notifications,ui-autocomplete,ui-sharecard,ui-panels}.js; rewrite ui.js as a re-export-only barrel. Proven lossless by the existing client-tests/ jsdom suite staying 100% green with ZERO test edits.

**Files:** Create the 6 public/js/ui/*.js; rewrite public/js/ui.js. Do NOT edit app.js, socketClient.js, client-tests/*.

**Verify:** exported-symbol superset check (old ui.js exports ⊆ barrel re-exports); `npm test -- --selectProjects client` PASS (ghost-attempt/poster-fallback/render-chain/render-lobby/socket-handlers/tutorial-trigger); `git diff --stat main -- public/js/app.js public/js/socketClient.js client-tests/` empty; browser smoke.

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/ui.js","public/js/ui/ui-dom.js","public/js/ui/ui-render.js","public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js","public/js/ui/ui-autocomplete.js","public/js/ui/ui-sharecard.js","public/js/ui/ui-panels.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- --selectProjects client","acceptanceCriteria":["every old ui.js export importable from ui.js barrel","ui.js is re-exports only","app.js/socketClient.js/client-tests unmodified","client jsdom suite 100% green unchanged","no new dependency"],"reviewModel":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: split public/style.css into 6 ordered partials
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cut style.css into public/css/01-base..06-states-anim.css at top-level banner boundaries (verbatim, no reformatting); load in original cascade order via 6 ordered <link> tags in index.html. Byte-identity gate is the spec.

**Files:** Create public/css/0N-*.css (6); modify public/index.html (~line 61 single <link>); git rm public/style.css after the gate passes.

**Verify:** `git show main:public/style.css > /tmp/o.css; cat public/css/01..06 > /tmp/c.css; diff /tmp/o.css /tmp/c.css` → EMPTY (capture pre-comment, Step 3); browser smoke at 1440px + 390px.

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/css/01-base.css","public/css/02-hero-lobby.css","public/css/03-game.css","public/css/04-modals.css","public/css/05-responsive.css","public/css/06-states-anim.css","public/index.html"],"verifyCommand":"diff <(git show main:public/style.css) <(cat public/css/0*.css)","acceptanceCriteria":["concat(01..06)==original byte-identical","index.html links exactly 6 partials in order, cache-busted; old <link> + style.css gone","no other index.html change","per-file WHY header added after gate"],"reviewModel":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: showScreen() helper + call-site migration (only logic change)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TDD a canonical showScreen(name) in public/js/ui/ui-dom.js (re-exported by the barrel); migrate the unambiguous .active/.hidden call sites; pin behaviour with client-tests/showScreen.test.js. Exclude ui-render.js gameScreen.classList.toggle('solo-mode-ui'/'speed-mode') (styling, not visibility). Lone/branchy app.js:233, socketClient.js:766/:787: migrate only if cleanly canonical else leave + // NOTE.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-dom.js, public/js/ui/ui-render.js, public/js/app.js, public/js/socketClient.js; create client-tests/showScreen.test.js. Spec-first (red→green→migrate).

**Verify:** `npm test` all green incl. new spec and UNMODIFIED socket-handlers.test.js; `git diff --stat main -- client-tests/` shows only showScreen.test.js added; coverage floor held; browser smoke of every migrated transition.

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/ui/ui-dom.js","public/js/ui/ui-render.js","public/js/app.js","public/js/socketClient.js","client-tests/showScreen.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm test","acceptanceCriteria":["showScreen in ui-dom.js, importable via ./ui.js barrel","showScreen.test.js asserts per-name group state, passes","migrated sites use showScreen; side-effects kept adjacent","solo-mode/speed-mode toggles untouched","lone sites migrated-or-NOTE per policy","full npm test green, zero edits to existing tests, coverage floor held"],"reviewModel":"standard"}
```

reviewProcess: Per task: independent spec-compliance review THEN independent code-quality review (separate subagents). Fix loop until both pass, then set status=completed + bump lastUpdated. Final whole-branch holistic review (most-capable model) before PR. Every changed line gets a WHY-comment. coverage/ never staged. PR-merge/deploy is user-gated.
